name: Peanut Butter Buckeyes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter, confectioner's sugar, and crunchy peanut butter in a medium bowl. Blend until smooth.
2. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls and chill.
3. Melt the paraffin (or sweet almond oil) and chocolate chips over hot water in a double boiler, but do not allow to boil.
4. Coat each ball by dipping one at a time into the melted mixture.
5. Place the coated balls on waxed paper to cool.
Makes 5 dozen.
